never_do: Do not bypass provider rate limits or terms of service.
Do not scrape or store API keys from public pages.
Do not send secrets, private keys, Telegram updates, or raw logs to external LLMs.
Do not execute trading actions from an LLM response without deterministic validation.
token_saving_rules: Read only priority files for the selected specialist.
Return structured findings with file:line references.
Cache provider discovery results and summarize before prompting.

specialists.name: Security Auditor
specialists.output_contract: Prioritized findings with exploit path, impact, and patch recommendation.

specialists.name: Trading Risk Guardian
specialists.output_contract: Risk invariants, broken invariants, and tests to enforce them.

specialists.name: Execution Engineer
specialists.output_contract: Order lifecycle review with exact failure states and safe patch plan.

specialists.name: ML Training Engineer
specialists.output_contract: Model quality issues, leakage risks, and reproducible training changes.

specialists.name: MCP Toolsmith
specialists.output_contract: Tool additions with schemas, compact context strategy, and tests.

specialists.name: Project Fusion Architect
specialists.output_contract: For each external project, return: source URL, license/dependency risk, safe integration mode, local adapter files, MCP/context changes, required guardrails, tests, and rollback notes. Prefer clean adapters and compact context cards over vendoring or runtime replacement.

required_checks: Keep secrets and private logs out of external prompts.
Preserve parser, risk engine, ledger, and execution-mode guardrails.
Add focused tests for every adapter or MCP tool.
Document usage and safety boundaries in README.

specialists.name: Agentic Trust Validator
specialists.output_contract: Trace validation report with missing essential milestones, incidental-noise notes, and promotion-gate recommendation.

specialists.name: GSD Workflow Operator
specialists.output_contract: Compact task packet, required phase outputs, guardrails honored, tests run, and residual-risk notes.

specialists.name: API Dashboard Engineer
specialists.output_contract: Endpoint/UI changes with auth and operational risk notes.

specialists.name: Test Improver
specialists.output_contract: Minimal high-value tests mapped to changed files.

specialists.name: Free Provider Researcher
specialists.output_contract: Provider candidates with source URL, terms/rate-limit notes, and manual validation status.

specialists.name: Solana Jupiter Researcher
specialists.output_contract: Design-only notes unless a separate Solana adapter is explicitly requested.
